LanguageData.TSOA_RelocateSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. The anima tree has been skipgated to the new location.
LanguageData.TSOA_RelocateFailure: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual, but failed to control it. The anima tree has been skipgated, but not to the desired location.
LanguageData.TSOA_FlowerPowerLetter: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite}. For the next {1} days, anima flowers on this map will be able to influence the temperature of the room they're in. Based on ritual quality, their heating and cooling power is multiplied by {2}.
LanguageData.TSOA_SeveringSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. For the next {1} days, all colonists will be psychically deafened.
LanguageData.TSOA_SeveringFailure: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual, but failed to control it. For the next {1} days, all colonists will be psychically deafened.
LanguageData.TSOA_FeverSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. For the next {1} days, the ritual targets will experience psychic fever.
LanguageData.TSOA_FeverFailure: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual, but failed to control it. For the next {1} days, the ritual targets will experience psychic fever.
LanguageData.TSOA_BeckoningSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing the {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. In a day or two, the desired trade caravan will arrive.
LanguageData.TSOA_BeckoningFailure: {0_nameDef} has failed at performing the {RITUAL_definite} ritual, and called a hostile group instead. In a day or two, a raid will arrive.
LanguageData.TSOA_EruptionSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing the {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. Valuable minerals have been pulled to the surface.
LanguageData.TSOA_EruptionFailure: {0_nameDef} has failed at performing the {RITUAL_definite} ritual, and an insectoid infestation has been brought to the surface along with the minerals.
LanguageData.TSOA_StormSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing the {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. The weather has been changed to {1}.
LanguageData.TSOA_StormFailure: {0_nameDef} has failed at performing the {RITUAL_definite} ritual. The weather has been changed to {1}.
